verification failed: Verification failed. The link may be invalid or expired.
agree to the Terms of Service: By logging in or signing up, you agree to the Terms of Service

name.min: Name should contains at least 2 symbols
name.max: Name should not be longer then 50 symbols

password.min: Password should contains at least 6 symbols
password.smallLetter: Password should contains at least 1 small letter
password.bigLetter: Password should contains at least 1 big letter
password.digit: Password should contains at least 1 digit
password.character: Password should contains at least 1 special character

password reset success: Password changed successfully. Please log in with your new password.
password reset error: Failed to reset password. The link may be invalid or expired.
email not verified: Please verify your email before logging in
check spam: If you don’t see the email, please check your Spam folder.
logout confirm: Are you sure you want to log out?

registration success.title: Check your email
registration success.info: We’ve sent you an email with a confirmation link. Please check your inbox and click the link to continue.

password recovery success.title: Check your email
password recovery success.info: We’ve sent you an email with a password reset link. Please check your inbox and click the link to continue.
